entries.summary: Phase 8 completed: All 14 code quality fixes implemented and verified. Tasks included: documenting false positive (8.1), fixing duplicate thread (8.2), adding path validation (8.3), subprocess improvements (8.4), proper path comparison (8.5), lazy import consolidation (8.6), LOCALAPPDATA caching (8.7), log level fix (8.8), magic number documentation (8.9), RRF docstring improvement (8.10), encoding fix (8.11), stop words constant (8.12), error recovery (8.13), and file size limits (8.14).
